<!--
Thanks for contributing to Bytewax! A few quick notes:

- If this PR is not ready for review, open it as a Draft.
- Bytewax requires a Developer Certificate of Origin (DCO) sign-off on each
  commit. If you forgot, run: `git commit -s --amend` (or rebase) and force-push.
- Bytewax is now community-maintained; reviews may take a little while.
  See MAINTAINERS.md for context.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this change does and why. -->

## Linked issue(s)

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Refs #456". Required for non-trivial changes. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Internal / refactor / CI

## How was this tested?

<!--
Tell reviewers what you ran. Examples:
- `just test-py` and `just test-rs` pass locally
- Added a new pytest in `pytests/...` that fails on `main` and passes here
- Manually ran `python -m bytewax.run examples/...` against a local Kafka
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO) — `git commit -s`
- [ ] Tests added or updated where it makes sense
- [ ] Docs / docstrings updated where it makes sense
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
